mapper.sql: select p.period_id, p.dept_id, d.dept_name, pd.employee_id, e.employee_name, p.period_code, p.status, ifnull(pd.net_pay, 0) as net_pay, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark from ims_payroll_period p left join sys_dept d on p.dept_id = d.dept_id left join ( select period_id, min(employee_id) as employee_id, sum(ifnull(net_pay, 0)) as net_pay from ims_payroll_detail group by period_id ) pd on p.period_id = pd.period_id left join ims_employee e on pd.employee_id = e.id
mapper.select: select p.period_id, p.dept_id, d.dept_name, pd.employee_id, e.employee_name, p.period_code, p.status, ifnull(pd.net_pay, 0) as net_pay, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark from ims_payroll_period p left join sys_dept d on p.dept_id = d.dept_id left join ( select period_id, min(employee_id) as employee_id, sum(ifnull(net_pay, 0)) as net_pay from ims_payroll_detail group by period_id ) pd on p.period_id = pd.period_id left join ims_employee e on pd.employee_id = e.id where p.period_id = #{periodId}

select d.detail_id, d.period_id, d.employee_id, e.employee_name, d.attendance_days, d.base_salary, d.commission, d.allowance, d.bonus, d.deduction, d.net_pay, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, d.remark from ims_payroll_detail d left join ims_employee e on d.employee_id = e.id where d.period_id = #{period_id}
mapper.insert:
insert into ims_payroll_period
dept_id, period_code, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{deptId}, #{periodCode}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from ims_payroll_period where period_id in
#{periodId}

delete from ims_payroll_detail where detail_id in
#{detailId}

delete from ims_payroll_detail where period_id in
#{periodId}
mapper.insert:
insert into ims_payroll_detail( period_id, employee_id, attendance_days, base_salary, commission, allowance, bonus, deduction, net_pay, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values
( #{item.periodId}, #{item.employeeId}, #{item.attendanceDays}, #{item.baseSalary}, #{item.commission}, #{item.allowance}, #{item.bonus}, #{item.deduction}, #{item.netPay}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark})
